storySpec.narrativeJob: Decide whether the launch is ready to expand
storySpec.audienceNeed: Help engineering and product leaders decide whether the launch is ready to expand.
storySpec.memorableTakeaway: Decide whether the launch is ready to expand

proofObligations.claim: Show the requested numeric series as an inspectable artifact.
Show the requested diagram as an inspectable artifact.
Show the requested screenshot as an inspectable artifact.
Show the requested code as an inspectable artifact.

pacing.intent: Establish the audience tension and central promise.
Develop the causal argument with distinct visual jobs.
Resolve proof obligations with inspectable artifacts.
Close with a decision, owner, and next checkpoint.

materials.title: Creation brief
materials.detail: User-supplied narrative intent; usable as context, not independent external proof.

materials.title: revenue.csv
materials.detail: User-supplied structured data available for editable charts and calculations.

materials.title: renderer.ts
materials.detail: User-supplied text evidence available for citation and synthesis.

materials.title: Chart-ready numeric series
materials.detail: An editable chart may be constructed from supplied values; chart semantics still require validation.

materials.title: Editable relationship diagram
materials.detail: NodeSlide can construct typed nodes and connectors from relationships in the story.

materials.title: screenshot evidence
materials.detail: No captured screenshot was supplied; composition may reserve an explicitly labeled replacement slot only.

materials.title: Execution trace evidence
materials.detail: The requested execution-trace artifact was not supplied and must not be claimed as evidence.
